headline_seed: U.S. moves toward troop reductions in Europe as Hegseth scolds NATO allies - The Washington Post
draft_text:
Defense Sec. Hegseth announced a six-month review of U.S. forces in Europe at NATO's Brussels meeting today, calling allied denial of basing rights during the Iran war "shameful." CBS News reports roughly 80,000 U.S. troops are currently stationed there.

And that's the mews.
